result.summary: Found 3 developer integration surfaces for apitoolkit.io/Monoscope: a Bearer-authenticated REST API at https://api.monoscope.tech, an MCP server at https://api.monoscope.tech/api/v1/mcp using the same project API key, and the `monoscope` CLI authenticated via `monoscope auth login` / project API key.

monoscope_project_api_key.label: Monoscope project API key
monoscope_project_api_key.setup: Sign in to the [Monoscope dashboard](https://app.monoscope.tech), then go to [Settings → API Keys](https://apitoolkit.io/docs/dashboard/settings-pages/api-keys/) and click **Create an API key**. A project API key is also generated automatically when you create a project, as described in the [onboarding guide](https://apitoolkit.io/docs/onboarding/). Keys are shown only once and are scoped to a single project.
